items.title: Fix model mapping and action for Veo client in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update aligns the mountsea worker's Veo client with Mountsea's official API by correcting model mappings and actions. Key changes include updating the `MODEL_MAPPING`, switching the action for `veo31-fast-ingredients`, clamping the aspect ratio, and removing unsupported resolution parameters. The public API remains unchanged, ensuring compatibility with existing user requests.

items.title: Enhance lyric synthesis for missing aligned_lyrics in Platform Service 🎤
items.summary: This update introduces a new synthesizer that generates `aligned_lyrics` from `aligned_words` when the upstream response omits it. This ensures that downstream consumers, like karaoke displays and the Nexior song player, receive the necessary line-level structure. The implementation has been verified to produce accurate results, maintaining compatibility with existing channels.
